chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Const. Petition No.S-2300 of 2011 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of M.A.No.6280/2011 (R/A) 2. For hearing of M.A.No.6279/2011 (S/A) 3. For orders on M.A.No.6327/2011 (C/A). 05.09.2018. Mr. Athar Abbas Solangi, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Safdar Ali Ghouri, Advocate for proposed accused. Mr.Raja Imtiaz Ali Solangi, A.P.G. -------- 1. It is stated by learned counsel for the proposed accused that in view of the above said circumstances does not press the review application, which he has filed on behalf of the proposed accused. In view of above, the review application is disposed of as not pressed. 2 & 3. It is stated by learned counsel for the petitioner that in view of law laid down by the Honourable Supreme Court of Pakistan in case of Mst.Sughran Bibi vs. the State (PLD 2018 SC-595) he does not press the listed application for prosecution of SHO P.S Civil Line, for his refusal to record his statement in terms of order of this Court. In view of above, the listed applications of the petitioner are dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE
